---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What problem does this solve?**
E.g. "My kids want stories in Tamil" or "Read-aloud is too fast for my 3-year-old."

**Proposed solution**
What you'd like to happen.

**Alternatives considered**
Other ways this could work, if any.

**Keep in mind**
Tales Genie runs entirely on Cloudflare's free tier and is aimed at kids aged 3–8 — features should stay within both constraints.
